description:
Overview:

[Couples Date Night Dice] Are you tired of the same old dates? Are you looking for creative couple's night ideas or anniversary gifts? Spice up a date with this romantic couple's dice set!
[Novelty Date Night Dice] This is the perfect game for a Valentine's Day party. Add a little fun to your time together as a couple, and you and your partner can explore new levels of intimacy to make your date night even more memorable.
[Wooden Date Night Dice] This date night dice is made of natural high-quality wood, measuring 16x10cm, the set includes 5 dice, 1 date planner board and 1 black storage bag, convenient for you to put all the items together, easy to carry and use.
[Start a New Date Journey] Simply roll the date night dice and let it plan your night, which will both help you reduce the stress of planning and add an element of surprise and excitement to your date night. Enjoy the journey of discovering new activities together and creating cherished memories!
[Perfect Gift] Add fun to a date with a romantic couple's dice set! This date night dice set makes a great gift for Valentine's Day, wedding anniversaries, birthdays, Christmas, engagements and weddings.


Product information:
Material Type: Wooden
Color: Date night dice-with 5 dice, date night dice suit-black bag
Style: modern simplicity
Board thickness: 0.6cm
Product size: 16 * 10cm
Black bag size: 20 * 15cm


Packing list:
Dice * 5 /Dice * 5+black bag * 1
